prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Audit kubernetes/kubernetes for RBAC privilege escalation paths. Find all Go source files that validate ClusterRole escalation rules — specifically, the files that enforce the 'escalation' verb restriction and prevent users from granting permissions they don't hold.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the kubernetes-ecosystem fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Audit kubernetes/kubernetes for RBAC privilege escalation paths. Find all Go source files that validate ClusterRole escalation rules — specifically, the files that enforce the 'escalation' verb restriction and prevent users from granting permissions they don't hold.
